source: MEXT 日本食品標準成分表(八訂)増補2023年 第2章 本表 (seed/source/mext_ch2_honpyo.xlsx) / MHLW 日本人の食事摂取基準(2025年版)策定検討会報告書 分割版PDF (seed/source/mhlw_dri2025/)
note: Full 2,538-food extraction via scripts/build_seed_from_mext.py, extended to 22 nutrients by scripts/add_nutrients_from_mext.py (magnesium/copper/vitamin E/niacin NE/B6/B12 from the same official MEXT table). Reference rows extended by scripts/add_mhlw_references_2025.py, transcribed from the official MHLW DRI 2025 tables (errata 2025-03-25 reflected). Official values copied as-is (number / (x) / Tr=0 / '-'=null); never recalculated. The original 40 curated foods are preserved verbatim. nutrient-amount.json is compact [food_id, nutrient_code, amount, value_status]; loadSeed rehydrates full records. Do not edit values manually.
